title: Central Command (Israel)

([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): פיקוד מרכז, *Pikud Merkaz*), often abbreviated to **Pakmaz** (פקמ"ז), is a regional [command](/wiki/Command_(military_formation) "Command (military formation)") of the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces"). It is responsible for the [units](/wiki/Military_unit "Military unit") and [brigades](/wiki/Brigade "Brigade") located in the [West Bank](/wiki/West_Bank "West Bank") (under the [West Bank Division](/wiki/West_Bank_Division "West Bank Division")), [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem"), the [Sharon](/wiki/Sharon,_Israel "Sharon, Israel"), [Gush Dan](/wiki/Gush_Dan "Gush Dan"), and the [Shephelah](/wiki/Shephelah "Shephelah").

Military unit

The **Central Command** ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): פיקוד מרכז, *Pikud Merkaz*), often abbreviated to **Pakmaz** (פקמ"ז), is a regional [command](/wiki/Command_(military_formation) "Command (military formation)") of the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces"). It is responsible for the [units](/wiki/Military_unit "Military unit") and [brigades](/wiki/Brigade "Brigade") located in the [West Bank](/wiki/West_Bank "West Bank") (under the [West Bank Division](/wiki/West_Bank_Division "West Bank Division")), [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem"), the [Sharon](/wiki/Sharon,_Israel "Sharon, Israel"), [Gush Dan](/wiki/Gush_Dan "Gush Dan"), and the [Shephelah](/wiki/Shephelah "Shephelah").

The [commander](/wiki/Aluf "Aluf") of the central command is the one who is authorized to declare new cities in the [Judea and Samaria Area](/wiki/Judea_and_Samaria_Area "Judea and Samaria Area").[[1]](#cite_note-city-1)

## History

During the [1948 Arab–Israeli War](/wiki/1948_Arab%E2%80%93Israeli_War "1948 Arab–Israeli War"), the Central Command was in-charge of the war efforts against [Jordan](/wiki/Jordan "Jordan"), particularly on the road to [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem"), occupying the "Small Triangle" (east [Sharon](/wiki/Sharon,_Israel "Sharon, Israel")), [Lod](/wiki/Lod "Lod"), and [Ramla](/wiki/Ramla "Ramla"). During the [Six-Day War](/wiki/Six-Day_War "Six-Day War"), the Command led the occupation of the [West Bank](/wiki/West_Bank "West Bank") from Jordan. As of the [First Intifada](/wiki/First_Intifada "First Intifada"), the Command primarily engages in security and [counter-terrorism](/wiki/Counter-terrorism "Counter-terrorism") activities, as well as more conventional military measures, in the West Bank.

Towards the end of 2010 the deployment of IDF troops in and around the West Bank reached a new quantitative low with only half the number of infantry battalions serving where "dozens" were required during the first Intifada.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Commanders

All commanders of the Central Command were ranked [Aluf](/wiki/Aluf "Aluf") ([Major General](/wiki/Major_General "Major General")).

* [Zvi Ayalon](/wiki/Zvi_Ayalon "Zvi Ayalon") (1948–1952)
* [Yosef Avidar](/wiki/Yosef_Avidar "Yosef Avidar") (1952–1953)
* Zvi Ayalon (1954–1956)
* [Zvi Zur](/wiki/Zvi_Zur "Zvi Zur") (1956–1958)
* [Meir Amit](/wiki/Meir_Amit "Meir Amit") (1958–1959)
* [Yosef Geva](/w/index.php?title=Yosef_Geva&action=edit&redlink=1 "Yosef Geva (page does not exist)") (1960–1966)
* [Uzi Narkis](/wiki/Uzi_Narkis "Uzi Narkis") (1966–1968)
* [Rehav'am Ze'evi](/wiki/Rehav%27am_Ze%27evi "Rehav'am Ze'evi") (1968–1972)
* [Yona Efrat](/wiki/Yona_Efrat "Yona Efrat") (1973–1977)
* [Moshe Levi](/wiki/Moshe_Levi "Moshe Levi") (1977–1981)
* [Ori Orr](/wiki/Ori_Orr "Ori Orr") (1981–1983)
* [Amnon Lipkin-Shahak](/wiki/Amnon_Lipkin-Shahak "Amnon Lipkin-Shahak") (1983–1986)
* [Ehud Barak](/wiki/Ehud_Barak "Ehud Barak") (1986–1987)
* [Amram Mitzna](/wiki/Amram_Mitzna "Amram Mitzna") (1987–1989)
* [Yitzhak Mordechai](/wiki/Yitzhak_Mordechai "Yitzhak Mordechai") (1989–1991)
* [Danny Yatom](/wiki/Danny_Yatom "Danny Yatom") (1991–1993)
* [Nehemiah Tamari](/wiki/Nehemiah_Tamari "Nehemiah Tamari") (1993–1994) - KIA
* Danny Yatom (1994)
* [Ilan Birn](/w/index.php?title=Ilan_Birn&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ilan Birn (page does not exist)") (1994–1995)
* [Uzi Dayan](/wiki/Uzi_Dayan "Uzi Dayan") (1996–1998)
* [Moshe Ya'alon](/wiki/Moshe_Ya%27alon "Moshe Ya'alon") (1998–2000)
* [Yitzhak Eitan](/w/index.php?title=Yitzhak_Eitan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Yitzhak Eitan (page does not exist)") (2000–2002)
* [Moshe Kaplinsky](/wiki/Moshe_Kaplinsky "Moshe Kaplinsky") (2002–2004)
* [Yair Nave](/wiki/Yair_Nave "Yair Nave") (2004–2007)
* [Gadi Shamni](/wiki/Gadi_Shamni "Gadi Shamni") (2007–2009)
* [Avi Mizrahi](/wiki/Avi_Mizrahi "Avi Mizrahi") (2009–2012)[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Nitzan Alon](/wiki/Nitzan_Alon "Nitzan Alon") (2012–2015)
* [Roni Numa](/wiki/Roni_Numa "Roni Numa") (2015–2018)
* [Nadav Padan](/w/index.php?title=Nadav_Padan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Nadav Padan (page does not exist)") (2018–2020)
* [Tamir Yadai](/wiki/Tamir_Yadai "Tamir Yadai") (2020–2021)
* [Yehuda Fox](/wiki/Yehuda_Fox "Yehuda Fox") (2021–)[[5]](#cite_note-5)
